title: Support  - Device with device connected
scenario: User views device details modal with blurred background after navigating to Menu > Support > Device and selecting a paired headset
steps: Pair and connect a headset to the device.
Select a device from the list.
expected: A modal slides up from the bottom showing detailed device information (device name, product ID, serial number, software version, HW revision, last connected) with a "Go" button. The background is blurred.
